title: [Cobblemon] More Vivillon´s
description: Adds extra Vivillon forms to your Minecraft World
body:
𝓜𝓸𝓻𝓮 𝓥𝓲𝓿𝓲𝓵𝓵𝓸𝓷´𝓼 

This resource pack /data pack allows the player to find 50 extra Vivillon variations in their Minecraft world!
(with some extra coming in the future)   


 𝓛𝓸𝓬𝓪𝓽𝓲𝓸𝓷𝓼  
- Jungle,                   
- Bamboo Jungle,
- Mangroves,
- Desert,
- Badlands,
- Savanna,
- Mountain,
- Cherry Grove,
- Plains,
- Sunflower Plains,
- Flower Forest,
- Dark Forest,
- Swamp,
- Taiga,
- End,
- Nether Wastes,
- Dripstone Caves,
- Warped Forest,
- Crimson Forest,
- Soul Sand Valley,
- Mushroom Fields,
- Deep Dark
  
 𝓗𝓸𝔀 𝓭𝓸 𝓲 𝓰𝓮𝓽 𝓽𝓱𝓮𝓶?   

To get them, you have to travel your world and find them in the wild or evolve your Spewpas like normal! You should see extra ones added!
(Right now there is a bug where you can evolve your Spewpas into all the versions of the biome you visited.)
This will be fixed as soon as possible.  

 𝓘𝓷𝓼𝓽𝓪𝓵𝓪𝓽𝓲𝓸𝓷 

To add these, just go to your world folder and navigate to Datapacks and add it to your world!  
Then move to your resources and activate them as well!

 𝑀𝑜𝒹 𝒷𝓎 𝑀𝑜 𝒶𝓃𝒹 𝒩𝓊𝓀𝒶
